allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if any\(x in k.lower\(\) for x in ['firebase','fcm','notification','expo-notification','messaging']\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); plugins = d.get\('expo',{}\).get\('plugins',[]\); print\(json.dumps\(plugins, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); android = d.get\('expo',{}\).get\('android',{}\); print\(json.dumps\(android, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('project_id:', d.get\('project_info',{}\).get\('project_id','?'\)\); clients=d.get\('client',[]\); [print\('package:', c.get\('client_info',{}\).get\('android_client_info',{}\).get\('package_name','?'\)\) for c in clients]")
